message: Command `New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'prisma' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/api/restaurants' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/api/menu' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/api/orders' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/dashboard' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/menu' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/orders' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/auth/login' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/app/auth/register' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/lib' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'src/components' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue` executed with exit code 0.

message.content:
Forge is treating this as a [api] based on your prompt. Generating plan...
Forge is treating this as a [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
The user wants a full-stack restaurant management application with 24 specific files. I will create them one by one or in batches where appropriate.

Plan:
1. Create configuration files: `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`, `.env.example`.
2. Create Prisma schema and client: `prisma/schema.prisma`, `src/lib/prisma.ts`.
3. Create Auth utilities and API: `src/lib/auth.ts`, `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`, `src/middleware.ts`.
4. Create Global styles: `src/app/globals.css`.
5. Create Components: `src/components/Navbar.tsx`, `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`, `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`, `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`.
6. Create API Routes: `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`.
7. Create Pages: `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/app/menu/page.tsx`, `src/app/orders/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`.

I'll start with the configuration files.
</think>
